hooks.command: if [ -f gosymdb.sqlite ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: gosymdb is indexed for this codebase. Use gosymdb commands instead of grep for symbol navigation. Run: gosymdb find --q <query> --json, or use /go:sym, /go:trace, /go:impact skills. Grep is only appropriate for non-symbol searches (string literals, TODOs, config values)."}}'; fi
